variables.name: AGE
variables.description: Age at diagnosis

variables.name: COG Risk Group
variables.description: COG risk stratification criteria at the time the patient enrolled

variables.name: GENDER
variables.description: Gender

variables.name: NAACCR_ETHNICITY
variables.description: NAACCR Ethnicity

variables.name: NAACCR_RACE
variables.description: NAACCR Race

variables.name: Protocol(s)
variables.description: COG Protocol number on which the patient was enrolled

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: TARGET Subject id

variables.name: diag
variables.description: Diagnostic Category (Revised INPC).  If INPC diagnostic category is missing, then this is Shimada diagnostic category.

variables.name: efscens
variables.description: Events are described as the first occurrence of relapse, progressive disease, secondary malignancy, or death.

variables.name: efstime
variables.description: Number of days from diagnosis until the event, or until last contact if no event

variables.name: grade
variables.description: Grade of Neuroblastic Differentiation (Revised INPC).  If INPC grade is missing, then this is Shimada grade.

variables.name: hist
variables.description: Revised INPC prognostic group (Cancer 2003). If INPC is missing, this is the Shimada classification (JNCI 1984).

variables.name: icdo
variables.description: ICD-O Topography Code (International Classification of Disease Code)

variables.name: icdo_snomed_description
variables.description: Either the ICDO code, or the SNOMED code (if ICDO=999 or Unknown) or a Hard-coded value if both codes unknown but information available

variables.name: inss_stage
variables.description: INSS stage

variables.name: mki
variables.description: MKI (Revised INPC).  If INPC MKI is missing, then this is Shimada MKI.  When multiple nodules present in a single Ganglioneuroblastoma, nodular tumor, the higher MKI value is reported.

variables.name: mycn
variables.description: MYCN status

variables.name: percent_necrosis
variables.description: Proportion of tumor (necrotic vs viable), as estimated on specimen quality control review by the Biopathology Center in Columbus

variables.name: percent_tumor
variables.description: Proportion of specimen (tumor vs non-tumor), as estimated on specimen quality control review by the Biopathology Center in Columbus

variables.name: ploidy
variables.description: Ploidy

variables.name: scens
variables.description: Events are described as the first occurrence of relapse, progressive disease, secondary malignancy, or death.

variables.name: snomed
variables.description: Older Topography Code (Systemized Nomenclature of Medicine-Clinical Terms)

variables.name: stime
variables.description: Number of days from diagnosis until death, or until last contact if alive

variables.name: ANALYTETYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: DISEASEPROJECT
variables.description: Disease project

variables.name: DISEASESTATE
variables.description: Disease state of sample

variables.name: EXTRACTNAME
variables.description: Extract name

variables.name: SAMPLENAME
variables.description: Sample Name

variables.name: SAMPLETYPE
variables.description: Sample type
